thunder: The sky is having a tantrum. Headphones recommended.
Thunder's oversharing again. You don't have to.
Boom weather. Indoors is the main character today.
Lightning wants an audience. You are not obligated.
Storm soundtrack on. Soft plans only.
The clouds are arguing. Stay out of it.
Dramatic sky day. Your to-do list can be boring.
Thunder means the universe needs a snack. You might too.
Flash-bang outdoors. Cozy is the strategy.
Storm mode: cancel heroics, keep the kettle.
rain: It's raining. Canceling outside is free and legal.
Wet socks are not a personality. Stay in.
Rain check on the rain. Soft socks instead.
Puddles are collecting stories. You can collect stillness.
Rain is doing the watering. You can do less.
It's pouring permission to stay horizontal-ish.
Rain on the roof is free white noise. Use it.
Wet weather. Dry plans. Perfect pairing.
The sky is rinsing itself. You don't have to rinse your schedule.
Drip drip. One indoor win is enough.
snow: Snow day energy, even if your calendar disagrees.
It's snowing. Ambition can wait in the hallway.
Snow is nature's pause button. Press it.
Cold sparkle weather. Hot drink supremacy.
The world put on a soft filter. Match it.
Snow means the ground is busy. You can rest.
Winter confetti. No RSVP required from you.
Icy outside. Gentle inside. That's the deal.
Snow day rules apply: softer expectations.
White noise, white ground. Quiet brain welcome.
fog: Foggy. Your brain has permission to match.
Can't see far. Don't plan far either.
The world hit soft focus. Join it.
Fog means mystery mode. One step is plenty.
Visibility low. Ambition can be too.
Misty day. Decisions can wait in the mist.
Everything's blurry on purpose. Soften your list.
Fog is a free sensory dimmer. Accept the gift.
Low clouds, low pressure on yourself.
The horizon called out sick. So can your overthinking.
Soft air, soft plans. That's cohesion.
cloud: Cloudy. Nature's blue-light filter, free of charge.
Gray skies, less squinting. We'll take it.
Overcast. The sun called in sick.
Cloud cover is free shade. Enjoy the discount.
Soft light day. Good for eyes and egos.
The sky put on a sweater. You can too.
Clouds are buffering the sun. Buffer your day.
Gray is a valid aesthetic. So is resting.
No harsh glare. No harsh self-talk either.
Overcast is the universe's softbox. Pose less, be more.
Clouds doing the heavy lifting. You do the light lifting.
sunHotHighUv: Don't forget sunscreen, even though it sucks.
The sun is being rude. Shade and water, please.
Hot UV chaos. You are not a plant. Cover up.
UV is clocked in overtime. Hat time.
Scorching and spicy. Indoors is not cowardice.
The sun wants a duel. Decline politely with SPF.
Heat plus UV equals boss fight. Bring shade potions.
You're not a lizard. Hydrate and hide a little.
This weather is a lot. Be a little less.
Solar oversharing. Sunscreen is your boundary.
Hot, bright, and unhinged. Soften your exposure.
The sky turned the brightness all the way up. Turn yours down.
sunHot: It's hot. Melting is optional; shade is not.
Scorcher. Move like molasses on purpose.
Heat wave. Your only job is not cooking yourself.
The air is soup. Sip water, skip sprints.
Too hot for heroics. Shade is the plan.
Heat makes everything louder. Quiet tasks win.
The sun turned the thermostat to mean. Be kind to you.
Hot day permission slip: do less, drink more.
If the sidewalk sizzles, your to-do list can simmer.
Heat haze is a vibe. Ambition can haze too.
sunHighUv: UV's up. Sunscreen, even if it's annoying.
Bright and spicy. A hat is low-effort armor.
The sun is doing too much. Soften it.
UV on the guest list. Shade is your plus-one.
Bright enough to sting. Cover the soft parts.
Sunshine with teeth. SPF is the muzzle.
High UV day. Windows count as outdoors sometimes.
The light is extra. You don't have to be.
Sunburn is not a souvenir. Prevention is.
Rays are aggressive today. Be gently defensive.
UV alert without the drama: hat, shade, done.
Bright sky, quiet skin. That's the goal.
sunChilly: Chilly. Warm drink > heroic outdoor quests.
Crisp air. One brave minute outside is plenty.
Cool out. Sweater weather, soft ambitions.
Nippy day. Layer up, demand less.
Cold edges on the air. Hot edges on the tea.
Chill in the air. Chill in the schedule.
Cool and clear. A short walk is a whole story.
The air has bite. Your plans can be toothless.
Cold nose, warm pace. Perfect combo.
sunWarm: Warm and almost inviting. Don't get bullied by it.
Nice out. A short stretch beats a whole saga.
Pleasant skies. Still no need to overdo it.
Friendly weather. Keep your plans friendly too.
Warm enough to tempt. Not enough to owe.
Goldilocks outdoors. One small yes is plenty.
Nice day energy. Borrow some, don't bankrupt yourself.
The weather is being polite. Be polite to yourself too.
Warm breeze, soft goals. Match the memo.
Good weather is not a deadline.
sunClear: Clear skies. Steady is still a flex.
Weather's behaving. You can too, slowly.
Open sky. Take only what feels doable.
Blue overhead. No need to fill it.
Clear day. Clear one tiny thing. Done.
The sky showed up. You already did too by being here.
Wide open weather. Narrow your list.
Sunny and simple. Keep your plans that way.
Clear air, clear permission to go gentle.
The weather cooperated. You don't owe it a marathon.
Bright and calm. Pick one of those for yourself.
Open sky is not an obligation. It's scenery.
fallback: Weather's hanging around. Tap for the gossip.
Sky's doing something. Soft plans still win.
The forecast shrugged. So can your schedule.
Whatever the sky is, your pace can stay yours.
Unclassified weather. Classified as a soft day.
The atmosphere is improvising. You don't have to.
Sky vibes: undefined. Human vibes: gentle.
